title: Sun
description: Astrophysical figures for the Sun. Distinct from planets.json because the Sun is not a planet — it has no orbital parameters around the solar-system barycentre relevant at this scale. Locale overlay (sun-overlay.schema.json) carries the editorial strings.

axial_tilt.description: Tilt of the rotation axis to the ecliptic, degrees.

equatorial_rot_days.description: Sidereal rotation period at the equator, days. The Sun rotates differentially.

polar_rot_days.description: Sidereal rotation period near the poles, days.

mass_fraction_pct.description: Percent of the solar system's mass contained in the Sun (~99.86).
